The '''Jorallan pearl''' was a type of beautiful [[Pearl/Legends|pearl]]. The spherical [[Gemstone/Legends|gemstone]] was found in the [[Ocean/Legends|oceans]] of<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]<ref name="EAOC">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Joralla system/Legends|Joralla system]]</ref> [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Joralla]].<ref name="CSWE Joralla">{{CSWECite|II|173|Joralla}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Jorallan pearl was introduced in the [[2008]] ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''.<ref name="CSWE" />
